text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
At last, today is the day Maruzensky makes her
debut!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Heh... I'm getting kind of nervous now that the
day has finally arrived...

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Hm? Why are you making that face?
choice_data_list:
I was just wondering if I overlooked anything
during your training...

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Hm? Why are you making that face?
choice_data_list:
I was just wondering if I overlooked anything
during your training...

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: It's fine! You did a primo job training me!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Besides, the journey is more important than the
destination. I'm going to have a great time, so
don't you worry!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
It's the Twinkle Series, you know, so I'm going full
throttle!
